characters.description: Earth's Forerunner and a leading defender of the planet. A peak-family warrior named Selena Turga courts him for his unusual potential, then tests him in a regulated fight that excludes weapons, magic, aura, and active abilities.
characters.name: Silas Renner

characters.description: A warrior from the core of the powerful Turga family. She approaches Silas with a courtship proposal and offers to guide his development, but first faces him in a formally restricted spar.
characters.name: Selena Turga

characters.description: Silas's trusted evolution specialist and a member of his established circle. She is already known to him before the events of this book.
characters.name: Asta

characters.description: Silas's off-world mentor from Clan Rayden and an experienced combat adviser. He is an established ally before the present crisis begins.
characters.name: Samvek

characters.description: Silas's trusted Eidolon and astral protector. He is an established companion before the Turga expedition arrives.
characters.name: Urg

characters.description: Silas's sister and an Earth defender already known from earlier events.
characters.name: Cease Renner

characters.description: Silas's sister, now identified as Cece Renner. Her victory in Mexico makes her a system agent.
characters.name: Cece Renner

characters.description: An Earth Forerunner and trusted ally of Silas. He is already part of Earth's defense network before this book opens.
characters.name: Jiang

characters.description: An Earth defender concentrating her efforts on Addis Ababa.
characters.name: Ada

characters.description: The leader of a survivor group sheltering in New York's subway tunnels. Her group has endured sustained monster attacks, and Silas notices that his calming aura behaves unusually around her.
characters.name: Simone Gilbert

characters.description: An unidentified human-looking woman who appears beside Silas underwater when an energy anomaly is detected beneath the seabed.
characters.name: Unidentified underwater woman

characters.description: An exceptionally capable member of the powerful Kalestian family whom Selena tells Silas to take seriously.
characters.name: Lana Kalestian

characters.description: An Aspen-family woman whom Selena regards as a serious danger to Silas. Her family has entered the contested sector, placing another powerful faction near Earth.
characters.name: Lily Aspen

characters.description: A demigoddess glimpsed fighting beside Silas in one of his possible futures. The vision does not establish whether that future will occur.
characters.name: Cami

characters.description: The Dragon Emperor and Cami's bonded companion. He arrives over Germany with thirteen dragons as an emissary of the Dragon System, his immense native power constrained while he is on Earth.
characters.name: Nico

characters.description: A human contact tied to the Divided Realms and already known to Silas's group.
characters.name: Dutch

characters.description: An Earth-born outsider from the Divided Realms whom Dutch brings to meet Silas. His dragonlike scales come from an inherited vest and a transformative-dragon bloodline rather than membership in Nico's group.
characters.name: Ryan Wilson

characters.description: Ryan's Epic-tier companion from the Divided Realms. Kumo reaches the Rayden compound with severely damaged foundations and is presently stranded on Earth.
characters.name: Kumo

characters.description: The unknown sender of a metal card that appears beside Silas. The brief message urges him to avoid distraction and create a different course, but provides no explanation of the sender's identity or powers.
characters.name: J

characters.description: The time-manipulating guide behind the earlier card and Ryan's meeting with Silas. He can move Silas and other powerful figures without detectable system or spatial magic, and offers only a limited warning about what they must survive.
characters.name: Jay

characters.description: Lana's grandfather and founder of the Kalestian line. He appears among the exceptionally powerful defenders gathered around Galen during the catastrophe Jay reveals.
characters.name: Abel Calestian

characters.description: A shifting, system-associated defender who confronts the void threat at Galen. He is one of the most powerful figures present, but no reliable personal name is given.
characters.name: the Voice

characters.description: The established leader of the Lepun aligned with Silas. She and her people entered Earth's wider alliance before the events of this book.
characters.name: Vex

characters.description: A leonine warrior of Clan Rayden. Silas tasks him with alerting off-world and human allies after the Turga confrontation.
characters.name: Kuno

characters.description: A low-level survivor training with the Lepun as a provisional Vanguard member. Despite limited power and past captivity, she volunteers for the Sydney raid so she can help protect others.
characters.name: Carmen Perez

characters.description: A manaphone developer traveling with engineers under Krimbori escort toward the safe zone.
characters.name: Joshua Dunn

characters.description: Silas's incoming director of communications. She has prior communications expertise and combat experience.
characters.name: Teresa Romano

characters.description: A Galenian scout and established member of Silas's allied circle. She is known to the group before the current events.
characters.name: Dory

characters.description: A Galenian fighter and Silas's adopted brother. Their bond and his place among Silas's allies predate this book.
characters.name: Crag

characters.description: A Galenian planner who already assists Silas's group. He is part of the established allied circle before this book begins.
characters.name: Nevin
